summary: All 4 phases completed. modules/home/email/aerc.nix refactored behavior-preservingly: let-bound mkQuerymap generator + shared foldersExclude (Phase 2 gate: entire home-manager-files derivation hash identical to baseline), 16 Task-NN citations consolidated into 11 rationale clusters with task numbers demoted to trailing citations (Phase 3), accounts.conf in-string comments hoisted to Nix level per D8 (comment-stripped diff empty, raw diff only removed #-lines, 0 non-# changes), rationale-preservation audit 11/11 PASS (Phase 4). home-manager build green after every phase; nix flake check --no-build passed. Finding-7 risk carried forward as flagged OPEN RISK comment (D7); all five KEEP decisions recorded in-file. One reported deviation: line count 384 -> 431 (+47) instead of the expected net reduction, driven by plan-mandated additions (contract header, KEEP records, finding-7 pointer, let block); no gate affected.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary: D1-D8 outcomes, sha256 diff-verification table (4 byte-identical files + D8-gated accounts.conf), 11/11 rationale-preservation audit table, line-count deviation note, and the manual user checklist for TUI/live-mail items (sidebar cleanliness, ~85-message INBOX scale, reply->send->archive->focus flow, Enter part-cycling, u check-mail toast, carried-forward live archive end-to-end and finding-7 probes).

Refactored aerc config (431 lines): top-level let with foldersExclude + mkQuerymap generator, cross-file contract header, 11 consolidated rationale clusters, five KEEP decisions and finding-7 OPEN RISK recorded in-file; rendered output behavior-identical to baseline.
